items.title: 53 martyred, 592 wounded in recent US aggression on Iran: Health Ministry
items.summary: Tehran, IRNA – The Iranian Ministry of Health reports that US airstrikes on the country between June 27 and the morning of July 31 left 53 people martyred and 592 others wounded.

items.title: Iran, Pakistan agree to strengthen cooperation on regional security
items.summary: Tehran, IRNA – Interior Minister Eskandar Momeni and Pakistan’s army chief Field Marshal Asim Munir have agreed to strengthen coordination and cooperation to safeguard regional security during talks in Rawalpindi, Pakistan’s military said.
